message:
Docs: improve README mermaid diagrams with all connectors and styling Update architecture diagrams in README.md to accurately reflect the current state of the codebase and improve visual presentation. **Class diagram (Connector interface)** - Add missing connectors: OpenCodeConnector, AmpConnector - Show all 5 implementations inheriting from Connector trait - Change relationship label from "produces" to "emits" for consistency - Fix NormalizedConversation field notation (Rust-style: `field: Type`) - Add pastel color styling classes for better visual hierarchy: - Connector and implementations: purple-tinted - NormalizedConversation: blue-tinted - Add diagram comment for context **Flowchart (Pipeline architecture)** - Separate the monolithic "Sources" node into 6 individual agent nodes - Each source agent (Codex, Cline, Gemini, Claude, OpenCode, Amp) now has its own box with individual connection to Connectors layer - Fix Mermaid syntax: use quoted strings with \n for multi-line labels instead of `
` which caused rendering issues - Simplify edge label: "Index New" → "Index" - Maintain pastel color scheme for visual consistency **Cargo.lock** - Version already bumped to 0.1.24 in prior release commit - Included here as it was modified alongside other changes These documentation improvements make the architecture clearer for new contributors and ensure diagrams render correctly across different Mermaid implementations (GitHub, VS Code, etc.). 🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code) Co-Authored-By: Claude

files.patch:
@@ -62,25 +62,40 @@ To achieve sub-60ms latency on large datasets, `cass` implements a multi-tier ca The system is designed for extensibility via the `Connector` trait (`src/connectors/mod.rs`). This allows `cass` to treat disparate log formats as a uniform stream of events. ```mermaid +%% Compact, pastel, narrow-friendly class diagram classDiagram class Connector { <> +detect() DetectionResult +scan(ScanContext) Vec } class NormalizedConversation { - +String agent_slug - +Vec messages + +agent_slug: String + +messages: Vec } class CodexConnector class ClaudeCodeConnector class GeminiConnector - + class OpenCodeConnector + class AmpConnector + Connector <|-- CodexConnector Connector <|-- ClaudeCodeConnector Connector <|-- GeminiConnector - - CodexConnector ..> NormalizedConversation : produces + Connector <|-- OpenCodeConnector + Connector <|-- AmpConnector + + CodexConnector ..> NormalizedConversation : emits + ClaudeCodeConnector ..> NormalizedConversation : emits + GeminiConnector ..> NormalizedConversation : emits + OpenCodeConnector ..> NormalizedConversation : emits + AmpConnector ..> NormalizedConversation : emits + + classDef pastel fill:#f4f2ff,stroke:#c2b5ff,color:#2e2963; + classDef pastelEdge fill:#e6f7ff,stroke:#9bd5f5,color:#0f3a4d; + class Connector pastel + class NormalizedConversation pastelEdge + class CodexConnector,ClaudeCodeConnector,GeminiConnector,OpenCodeConnector,AmpConnector pastel ``` - **Polymorphic Scanning**: The indexer iterates over a `Vec>`, unaware of the underlying file formats (JSONL, SQLite, specialized JSON). @@ -109,31 +124,36 @@ flowchart LR classDef pastel5 fill:#ffeef2,stroke:#f5b0c2,color:#4d1f2c; subgraph Sources - A[Codex - Cline - Gemini - Claude - OpenCode - Amp]:::pastel + A1[Codex]:::pastel + A2[Cline]:::pastel + A3[Gemini]:::pastel + A4[Claude]:::pastel + A5[OpenCode]:::pastel + A6[Amp]:::pastel end subgraph "Ingestion Layer" - C1[**Connectors**
Detect & Scan
Normalize
Dedupe]:::pastel2 + C1["Connectors\nDetect & Scan\nNormalize & Dedupe"]:::pastel2 end subgraph "Dual Storage" - S1[**SQLite (WAL)**
Source of Truth
Relational Data
Migrations]:::pastel3 - T1[**Tantivy Index**
Search Optimized
Edge N-Grams
Prefix Cache]:::pastel4 + S1["SQLite (WAL)\nSource of Truth\nRelational Data\nMigrations"]:::pastel3 + T1["Tantivy Index\nSearch Optimized\nEdge N-Grams\nPrefix Cache"]:::pastel4 end subgraph "Presentation" - U1[**TUI (Ratatui)**
Async Search
Filter Pills
Details]:::pastel5 - U2[**CLI / Robot**
JSON Output
Automation]:::pastel5 + U1["TUI (Ratatui)\nAsync Search\nFilter Pills\nDetails"]:::pastel5 + U2["CLI / Robot\nJSON Output\nAutomation"]:::pastel5 end - A --> C1 + A1 --> C1 + A2 --> C1 + A3 --> C1 + A4 --> C1 + A5 --> C1 + A6 --> C1 C1 -->|Persist| S1 - C1 -->|Index New| T1 + C1 -->|Index| T1 S1 -.->|Rebuild| T1 T1 -->|Query| U1 T1 -->|Query| U2
